## Source data

The videos/images on this page are based on the
[4km eReefs BioGeoChemical model (v4.2)](https://research.csiro.au/ereefs/models/)
run with SOURCE Catchments using Baseline catchment conditions.
The model builds on the CSIRO Environmental Modelling Suite (EMS), described in the paper:
[Scientific description of the optical and biogeochemical models (vB3p0)](https://doi.org/10.5194/gmd-2019-115).
The dataset metadata is available from the NCI GeoNetwork:
[eReefs GBR4 Biogeochemistry and Sediments v4.2 baseline catchment scenario](https://geonetwork.nci.org.au/geonetwork/srv/eng/catalog.search#/metadata/f6996_7913_7370_5760).
The raw model data is available from the
[NCI THREDDS server](https://thredds.nci.org.au/thredds/catalog/fx3/gbr4_H4p0_ABARRAr2_OBRAN2020_FG2Gv3_B4p2_Cq5b_Dhnd/catalog.html)
(daily, in curvilinear NetCDF format).
